note: The FRESH-WINDOW ENTRY GATE. A name is BLOCKED from buying when its 10-min read is falling, no matter how strong its daily/weekly windows are — this is the fix for nosedive entries (buying XTZ/XRP/BONK while they dropped on stale daily strength). 'blocked' lists every moving name that was kept out and exactly why.
